subject: Mathematics
title: JEE Main 2026 (Session 2, 02 Apr, Shift 1) — Mathematics

source.qp: Official NTA question paper — B.E./B.Tech, Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift 1 (JEEMain-2026-S2-02Apr-Shift1-QP.pdf)
source.key: Official NTA Final Answer Key — Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First (JEEMain-2026-S2-FinalAnswerKey.pdf)

_provenance: SOURCE-GROUNDED, NOT memory-based. Question stems and options transcribed verbatim from the official NTA question paper PDF (eyes-on read of the OCR text + the QP page images). Every correct answer is taken from the official NTA FINAL ANSWER KEY by resolving each Question Id to its correct Option Id and reading that option's text from the QP. Numeric (Section B) answers are the key's literal values.
_coverageNote: Mathematics only (the app is maths). Section A = 20 single-correct MCQ (4 marks each); Section B = 5 numeric (4 marks each). Q17 is OMITTED because its 4th option renders indistinguishably from the correct option in the source PDF and cannot be transcribed without fabrication; _origQ preserves original paper numbers. Built: 24 of 25 maths questions, 96 marks.

questions.prompt: Let $\alpha,\ \alpha+2$, $\alpha\in\mathbb{Z}$, be the roots of the quadratic equation $x(x+2)+(x+1)(x+3)+(x+2)(x+4)+\dots+(x+n-1)(x+n+1)=4n$ for some $n\in\mathbb{N}$. Then $n+\alpha$ is equal to :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 2

questions.prompt: Let $x$ and $y$ be real numbers such that $50\left(\dfrac{2x}{1+3i}-\dfrac{y}{1-2i}\right)=31+17i$, $i=\sqrt{-1}$. Then the value of $10(x-3y)$ is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 75

questions.prompt: Let $\alpha,\beta\in\mathbb{R}$ be such that the system of linear equations $x+2y+z=5$, $2x+y+\alpha z=5$, $8x+4y+\beta z=18$ has no solution. Then $\dfrac{\beta}{\alpha}$ is equal to :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): $4$

questions.prompt: Let $A=\begin{bmatrix}1&2\\1&\alpha\end{bmatrix}$ and $B=\begin{bmatrix}3&3\\\beta&2\end{bmatrix}$. If $A^2-4A+I=O$ and $B^2-5B-6I=O$, then among the two statements (S1): $[(B-A)(B+A)]^{T}=\begin{bmatrix}13&15\\7&10\end{bmatrix}$ and (S2): $\det(\operatorname{adj}(A+B))=-5$ :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): only (S2) is correct

questions.prompt: Let $A$ be the set of first 101 terms of an A.P., whose first term is 1 and the common difference is 5 and let $B$ be the set of first 71 terms of an A.P., whose first term is 9 and the common difference is 7. Then the number of elements in $A\cap B$, which are divisible by 3, is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 5

questions.prompt: The number of seven-digit numbers, that can be formed by using the digits 1, 2, 3, 5 and 7 such that each digit is used at least once, is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 16800

questions.prompt: The number of elements in the set $S=\left\{(r,k):k\in\mathbb{Z}\text{ and }{}^{36}C_{r+1}=\dfrac{6\cdot{}^{35}C_r}{(k^2-3)}\right\}$, is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 4

questions.prompt: If the mean of the data with classes 5-10, 10-15, 15-20, 20-25, 25-30, 30-35 and corresponding frequencies 2, $k$, 28, 54, $k+1$, 5 is 21, then $k$ is one of the roots of the equation :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): $2x^2-19x-10=0$

questions.prompt: Let the mid points of the sides of a triangle $ABC$ be $\left(\tfrac{5}{2},7\right)$, $\left(\tfrac{5}{2},3\right)$ and $(4,5)$. If its incentre is $(h,k)$, then $3h+k$ is equal to :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 13

questions.prompt: Let an ellipse $\dfrac{x^2}{a^2}+\dfrac{y^2}{b^2}=1$, $a<b$, pass through the point $(4,3)$ and have eccentricity $\dfrac{\sqrt{5}}{3}$. Then the length of its latus rectum is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): $\dfrac{8\sqrt{5}}{3}$

questions.prompt: If $\sin\left(\dfrac{\pi}{18}\right)\sin\left(\dfrac{5\pi}{18}\right)\sin\left(\dfrac{7\pi}{18}\right)=K$, then the value of $\sin\left(\dfrac{10K\pi}{3}\right)$ is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): $\dfrac{\sqrt{3}+1}{2\sqrt{2}}$

questions.prompt: Let $S=\{x\in[-\pi,\pi]:\sin x\,(\sin x+\cos x)=a,\ a\in\mathbb{Z}\}$. Then $n(S)$ is equal to :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 9

questions.prompt: If the point of intersection of the lines $\dfrac{x+1}{3}=\dfrac{y+a}{5}=\dfrac{z+b+1}{7}$ and $\dfrac{x-2}{1}=\dfrac{y-b}{4}=\dfrac{z-2a}{7}$ lies on the $xy$-plane, then the value of $a+b$ is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 7

questions.prompt: If $\vec{a}$ and $\vec{b}$ are two vectors such that $|\vec{a}|=2$ and $|\vec{b}|=3$, then the maximum value of $3\left|3\vec{a}+2\vec{b}\right|+4\left|3\vec{a}-2\vec{b}\right|$ is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 60

questions.prompt: Let a line $L$ passing through the point $(1,1,1)$ be perpendicular to both the vectors $2\hat{i}+2\hat{j}+\hat{k}$ and $\hat{i}+2\hat{j}+2\hat{k}$. If $P(a,b,c)$ is the foot of perpendicular from the origin on the line $L$, then the value of $34(a+b+c)$ is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 100

questions.prompt: If $\displaystyle\lim_{x\to 2}\dfrac{\sin(x^3-5x^2+ax+b)}{(\sqrt{x-1}-1)\log_e(x-1)}=m$, then $a+b+m$ is equal to :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 6

questions.prompt: The number of critical points of the function $f(x)=\begin{cases}\left|\dfrac{\sin x}{x}\right|,&x\neq0\\1,&x=0\end{cases}$ in the interval $(-2\pi,2\pi)$ is equal to :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 5

questions.prompt: Let $[\cdot]$ denote the greatest integer function. Then the value of $\displaystyle\int_{0}^{3}\dfrac{e^{x}+e^{-x}}{[x]!}\,dx$ is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): $\dfrac{1}{2}\left(e^2+e^3-\dfrac{1}{e^2}-\dfrac{1}{e^3}\right)$

questions.prompt: Let $y=y(x)$ be the solution curve of the differential equation $(1+\sin x)\dfrac{dy}{dx}+(y+1)\cos x=0$, $y(0)=0$. If the curve $y=y(x)$ passes through the point $\left(\alpha,-\dfrac{1}{2}\right)$, then a value of $\alpha$ is :
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): $\dfrac{\pi}{2}$

questions.prompt: If the domain of the function $f(x)=\sqrt{\log_{(0.6)}\left(\left|\dfrac{2x-5}{x^2-4}\right|\right)}$ is $(-\infty,a]\cup\{b\}\cup[c,d]\cup(e,\infty)$, then the value of $a+b+c+d+e$ is _____.
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 4

questions.prompt: If $\displaystyle\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k=6n^3$, then $\displaystyle\sum_{k=1}^{6}\left(\dfrac{a_{k+1}-a_k}{36}\right)^2$ is equal to _____.
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 91

questions.prompt: Let $a,b,c\in\{1,2,3,4\}$. If the probability, that $ax^2+2\sqrt{2}\,bx+c>0$ for all $x\in\mathbb{R}$, is $\dfrac{m}{n}$, $\gcd(m,n)=1$, then $m+n$ is equal to _____.
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 81

questions.prompt: Let a circle $C$ have its centre in the first quadrant, intersect the coordinate axes at exactly three points and cut off equal intercepts from the coordinate axes. If the length of the chord of $C$ on the line $x+y=1$ is $\sqrt{14}$, then the square of the radius of $C$ is _____.
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 8

questions.prompt: If $\alpha=\displaystyle\int_{0}^{2\sqrt{3}}\log_2(x^2+4)\,dx+\int_{2}^{4}\sqrt{2^x-4}\,dx$, then $\alpha^2$ is equal to _____.
questions.msAnswer: Official NTA final answer key (Exam Date 02.04.2026, Shift First): 192
